title: Onyxia MCP catalog
summary: Registry of MCP actions that make Onyxia components discoverable and safely actionable by agents.

security.auth: To be designed; likely OIDC delegated actions plus audit logs
security.notes: MCP actions must be least-privilege and auditable before touching user/project resources.

runtimeHooks.target: List catalog items, read UAT status, propose service launch

blockers: User decision needed on allowed action scope and privilege level.

notes: Initial MCP scope should be read-heavy and proposal-oriented before allowing mutating actions.
